description: Configure the OpenBCI GUI to display a topographic head plot alongside a time series view during EEG data playback using the recording file located at /home/ga/Documents/OpenBCI_GUI/Recordings/OpenBCI-EEG-S001-EyesOpen.txt. The dashboard must be configured to show both widgets simultaneously. Save a screenshot of the active session to /home/ga/Documents/OpenBCI_GUI/Screenshots/head_plot_session.png.
